funding_opportunities.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade (DPIIT)

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-recognized startups incorporated less than 2 years ago with business idea for product/service with market fit, viable commercialization, and scope of scaling

funding_opportunities.program_name: MeitY GENESIS Scheme - Matching Investment Funding
funding_opportunities.organization: Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY)
benefits: matching equity funding up to ₹50 lakh

eligibility.summary: DPIIT-registered startups in ICT domains, from Tier-II/III cities; for investment component, must have secured private investor interest with 1:1 matching; for pilot, must have valid PO/WO from corporate/PSU/unicorn

incubation_support: through implementing agencies across Tier-II/III cities

eligibility.summary: Technology startups in IT/ITeS from 12 Tier-II STPI centres (Agartala, Bhilai, Bhopal, Bhubaneswar, Dehradun, Guwahati, Jaipur, Lucknow, Prayagraj, Mohali, Patna, Vijaywada)
Pre-seed and seed-stage Indian startups; sector-agnostic; first-time founders welcome; must be building from India
